svg.text: Claude Code · Cursor · Codex · Gemini CLI
Double task system — Squad /tasks vs Mirror /tasks
No reconciliation; tasks can diverge across stores
OpenClaw Gateway — expired OAuth, 6 agents degraded
Mirror doesn't consume Redis bus (no XREVRANGE)
Memory store is write-only from bus; no reactive recall
Economy events invisible to semantic memory layer
Circuit breaker config not yet wired to adapters layer
stdio MCP deprecated but not removed
Legacy path still referenced; cleanup pending
Mumega / Agent OS — Service Dependency Map
30 nodes · 7 layers · 4 transport types · 6 debt items
